'''Kalaides''' were diminutive mollusks native to [[Cols/Legends|Cols]]. They were large and covered in spines, helpful to drive away the many predators of [[Colsa|Cols]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1994-06-XX -->''[[Creatures of the Galaxy]]''
